series_metadata.series_title: Gifted and talented local education agency policies
series_metadata.series_description: District acceleration policies, parent notification procedures for identification of gifted and talented children and possible provision of services, and method for identifying gifted and talented students.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the electronic record for 5 years; then delete ; Paper: Retain paper in operating area until imaged and indexed. Once confirmed the paper copy has been checked for accuracy, quality, and completeness, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
